title: Bernard: Mission Mars
overview: In order to regain recognition, the most unlucky agent, Backkom Bear, sneaked into the Mars mission, but unexpectedly broke into the mysterious world of Mars and became friends with the Martian monster he wanted to capture. Between the honor of an agent and friendship, he will face an unprecedented test.
